## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Siit and GrowthX to discuss content strategy, SEO performance, and upcoming initiatives.](https://fathom.video/share/33zwahxyCn-LYBUV51vauFdFJgLyW4tf?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Blog traffic growing steadily; impressions and keywords at all-time highs](https://fathom.video/share/33zwahxyCn-LYBUV51vauFdFJgLyW4tf?tab=summary&timestamp=2.0)
  - [Need to implement FAQ sections on blog posts to improve LLM visibility](https://fathom.video/share/33zwahxyCn-LYBUV51vauFdFJgLyW4tf?tab=summary&timestamp=3.0)
  - [Reddit content offers valuable insights for article topics and enrichment](https://fathom.video/share/33zwahxyCn-LYBUV51vauFdFJgLyW4tf?tab=summary&timestamp=247.0)
  - [French site redirects causing volatility; focus remains on US/English growth](https://fathom.video/share/33zwahxyCn-LYBUV51vauFdFJgLyW4tf?tab=summary&timestamp=1426.0)

## Topics

### Content Performance Update

  - [All planned content currently in production](https://fathom.video/share/33zwahxyCn-LYBUV51vauFdFJgLyW4tf?tab=summary&timestamp=51.0)
  - [Next round of content in the works, including tool comparisons](https://fathom.video/share/33zwahxyCn-LYBUV51vauFdFJgLyW4tf?tab=summary&timestamp=563.0)
  - [Blog traffic growing: 440 clicks last month, up from previous periods](https://fathom.video/share/33zwahxyCn-LYBUV51vauFdFJgLyW4tf?tab=summary&timestamp=51.0)
  - [20 newsletter signups captured in past 2.5 weeks from blog posts](https://fathom.video/share/33zwahxyCn-LYBUV51vauFdFJgLyW4tf?tab=summary&timestamp=1267.0)
  - [Tool pages already seeing traffic (20+ views) despite recent publication](https://fathom.video/share/33zwahxyCn-LYBUV51vauFdFJgLyW4tf?tab=summary&timestamp=1320.0)

### SEO Performance Overview

  - [Blog healthy growth: 440 clicks, significant room for further growth](https://fathom.video/share/33zwahxyCn-LYBUV51vauFdFJgLyW4tf?tab=summary&timestamp=51.0)
  - [Glossary section seeing good traction after fixing indexing issues](https://fathom.video/share/33zwahxyCn-LYBUV51vauFdFJgLyW4tf?tab=summary&timestamp=1661.0)
  - [AI-related SERP features slightly flat, mirroring general trends](https://fathom.video/share/33zwahxyCn-LYBUV51vauFdFJgLyW4tf?tab=summary&timestamp=1741.0)
